date_notes: Date matches the publication date of the CBC report that broke the story (R-034). The recording itself was made earlier; the news event documented here is the recording becoming public.
title_en: Kenney captured on recording coordinating UCP leadership review strategy with staff
description_en: A recording surfaced in which Premier Jason Kenney is heard discussing the UCP leadership review with party staff. The recording was made by a third party and released without Kenney's knowledge or consent; that context is noted here as relevant to how the material was obtained. The recording's contents include discussions of internal political strategy regarding the review.
verification_notes: Restored 2026-06-14 from a prior contamination in which DynaLife Auditor General report metadata (event_date, era, category, actors, source_refs, opposition_response, verification_notes) had overwritten this record's fields. Title and description survived correctly. Source R-034 (CBC News, Tier 2, verified) anchors the event. Single source; consider attaching additional Tier 2 coverage (Globe and Mail, CTV, or similar) before publication. The leaked-without-consent context is preserved as a sourcing-integrity note.

update_log.change: Language corrected: 'secretly recorded' replaced with 'captured on recording' to accurately reflect that Kenney was recorded by a third party, not that he did the recording. Recording context (third-party, without consent) added to description.

Restored from contamination: title_en and description_en were correct but event_date (2025-11-01), era (smith), category (healthcare_privatization), actors (Auditor General of Alberta), opposition_response (Shepherd 2025-11-24), source_refs (R-007), title_fr, verification_notes, and standards_flags had been overwritten with DynaLife AG report data. Set event_date to 2022-03-01 matching R-034's publication date, era to kenney, actors to Jason Kenney as Premier, category to transparency/accountability/party_discipline, source_refs to R-034. Cleared the unsourced Shepherd opposition_response (the lead is preserved in EVT-109 verification_notes for future sourcing).
